channel.title: LLM Timeline — AI Singapore Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from AI Singapore.

item.title: Gemma-SEA-LION-v4-27B-IT (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: SEA-LION v3.5 70B R (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: SEA-LION v3.5 70B R License: open Type: model "Based on Llama 3.1 70B. SEA-LION v3.5, our first set of hybrid reasoning models trained on Southeast Asian data. Mode selection is managed through the tokenizer’s chat template and offers versatile functionality, handling both complex reasoning tasks and general text generation."

item.title: SEA-LION V3 Gemma2 9B (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: SEA-LION V3 Llama3.1 8B (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: SEA-LION V3 Llama3.1 70B (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: SEA-LION-v1-7B-IT (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 7.5B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: SEA-LIONv3 (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: SEA-LIONv3 License: open Type: model SEA-LION is a collection of Large Language Models (LLMs) which has been pretrained and instruct-tuned for the Southeast Asia (SEA) region. The Gemma2 9B CPT SEA-LIONv3 base model which has undergone continued pre-training from the base Gemma-2-9B model. SEA-LION stands for Southeast Asian Languages In One Network.' News: https://www.techinasia.com/news/ai-singapore-boosts-sea-ai-sealion-v3-model

item.title: Llama SEA-LION V2 8B (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: Llama-SEA-LION-v2-8B-IT (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore

item.title: Sea-Lion (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: Sea-Lion License: open Type: model MPT base. MMLU=26.87. Southeast Asian languages like Thai, Vietnamese and Bahasa Indonesia. https://www.computerweekly.com/feature/Sea-Lion-explained-Southeast-Asias-first-large-language-model

item.title: SEA-LION V1 3B (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model AI model by AI Singapore
